Emerging Markets ETFs Consolidate Near Crucial Support

holdings.infoBox: EDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 134 individual holdings. The top holdings are Ambev stock at 3.48%, Sino-American Silicon Products at 3.31%, SINBON Electronics at 2.49%, Banco Bradesco at 2.15%, and Saudi Telecom Company at 2.05%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Emerging Markets Dividend ETF (EDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a yield-weighted index of high-dividend-paying firms in emerging markets. The index screens for 3-year positive earnings growth and profitability. EDIV was launched on Feb 23, 2011 and is issued by State Street.
